Tier 1 — AE-Led Outbound Priority

Highest priority accounts with strongest Shopify Plus B2B fit. Characteristics: ~$200M+ revenue, does both B2B and DTC ecommerce, likely on a competitor platform (Adobe Commerce, BigCommerce, Salesforce Commerce Cloud, Commercetools), clear leadership changes or stated growth intent, large and established company. AE drives all outreach for these accounts.
$200M+ Revenue B2B + DTC Ecommerce Competitor Platform Leadership Changes Growth Signals
Tier 1 Progress0 / 35 dismissed
35 accounts
Account Tier Dossier Why Shopify Plus B2B AE Notes BDR Notes Dismiss
Rittal North America, LLC
🌐 rittal.com · Illinois · LinkedIn
Rittal North America is a pure B2B manufacturer riding the AI/data center buildout wave—their parent (Friedhelm Loh Group, €3.1B revenue) has been aggressively expanding into AI infrastructure. Their distributor and dealer network would benefit enormously from a Shopify Plus B2B buyer portal with custom pricing, bulk ordering, and net terms. As they scale into a high-velocity market, replacing manual/EDI-only ordering with a self-serve B2B portal reduces friction for resellers who need to move fast.

SCRATCH AND PECK LLC is a high-priority B2B prospect previously designated Tier 1. Conduct targeted research to confirm: current platform (looking for competitor displacement), revenue scale (~$200M+), and recent leadership or growth signals. Shopify Plus B2B would support their wholesale ordering with company accounts, custom pricing, net terms, and a branded buyer portal.

Rothco, Inc
🌐 rothco.com · New York · LinkedIn
Rothco is one of the largest B2B wholesale distributors of military, tactical, and outdoor gear in the US—a $135M+ operation selling to thousands of retailers, dealers, and government buyers. New CGO Alice Lerman signals a fresh push to scale their digital B2B channel. Shopify Plus B2B would give Rothco's wholesale buyers a modern self-serve portal with volume pricing, company accounts, net terms, and draft orders—replacing what is likely a legacy catalog/phone-order process that creates friction for dealers who want to reorder 24/7.

Masimo Corp
🌐 masimo.com · California · LinkedIn
Masimo is a $2B+ publicly-traded healthcare company undergoing a major strategic pivot under new CEO Katie Szyman—they divested consumer audio to double down on B2B medical device distribution. This restructuring creates a prime window to modernize their distributor ordering experience with Shopify Plus B2B: company accounts, custom pricing by distributor tier, PO-based ordering, and net payment terms that mirror how hospitals and healthcare networks actually buy. Their compliance-focused needs align with Shopify's enterprise security and ERP integration capabilities.

Alliance Consumer Group
🌐 acgbrands.com · Texas · LinkedIn
Alliance Consumer Group is a PE-backed multi-brand consumer goods company with an active AI/ML supply chain initiative—they're already investing in digital infrastructure. Their portfolio spans B2B wholesale distribution and DTC across personal care, health, and home categories. Shopify Plus B2B would consolidate their wholesale ordering across multiple brand portfolios, with company accounts, custom pricing per brand/buyer, and unified inventory—giving their PE backers a scalable platform as they continue acquiring brands rather than rebuilding ecommerce infrastructure for each new acquisition.

Wahl Professional
🌐 wahlpro.com · Illinois · LinkedIn
Wahl Professional is a $1B+ private family brand selling professional clippers and grooming equipment through both B2B salon/barber distribution and DTC. Their new "Make it With Wahl" brand platform (2024) signals investment in digital marketing and commerce modernization. Shopify Plus B2B would let Wahl run their professional distributor ordering (with salon-specific pricing, bulk ordering, and net terms) alongside their DTC consumer site—all from one platform, unified inventory, single truth for product data.
Diamond Pet Foods
🌐 diamondpet.com · Missouri · LinkedIn
Diamond Pet Foods is one of the largest private pet food manufacturers in the US ($1.5B+ estimated), selling through a B2B-first model to thousands of independent pet stores, regional chains, and retail distributors. Their $259M new manufacturing facility investment signals aggressive growth plans. Shopify Plus B2B would modernize their dealer and distributor ordering experience with custom pricing by distributor tier, bulk ordering, net terms, and a self-serve buyer portal that scales with their expanding production capacity—reducing the phone/fax/EDI order burden as they add new distribution accounts.

Tier 2 — AE + BDR Collaborative Focus

Strong growth signals with meaningful B2B or B2B+DTC ecommerce presence. May have recent leadership changes, press coverage, or funding. AE and BDR work through ~5 accounts per week together—AE leads strategy and senior outreach, BDR executes touches and qualifies intent.
Growth Signals B2B or B2B+DTC Ecommerce Presence Leadership / News Activity 5 Accounts / Week

Paul Smith
🌐 paulsmith.com · New York · LinkedIn
 Wk 1 (Apr 27–May 01)
Paul Smith operates both B2B wholesale and a rapidly growing DTC channel (up 14% YoY), making them an ideal candidate for Shopify Plus B2B's unified commerce approach. Shopify Plus B2B would give their wholesale buyers a branded self-serve portal with net payment terms, custom pricing by buyer tier, and draft order workflows—while the same platform powers their DTC storefront.

Kenmark Eyewear was acquired by PE-backed Zyloware in August 2025—a classic post-acquisition window where new owners evaluate and modernize all operational infrastructure. As a B2B-first eyewear frame supplier to optical retailers and eye care professionals (ECPs), Shopify Plus B2B would give their buyer network a modern self-serve portal with ECP-specific pricing, net terms, and company accounts. PE-driven consolidation means they need infrastructure that scales across Zyloware's combined portfolio.

REALTREE
🌐 realtree.com · Georgia · LinkedIn
 Wk 28 (Nov 02–Nov 06)
REALTREE operates a massive B2B licensing ecosystem ($4B+ in licensed product value) and is actively building out direct-to-consumer channels alongside their established trade relationships. Shopify Plus B2B would enable them to digitize wholesale ordering for licensed product buyers and private label customers, while their growing DTC presence can live on the same platform—giving them unified commerce infrastructure as the brand expands beyond licensing into owned channels.
Candle Warmers Etc
🌐 candlewarmers.com · Utah · LinkedIn
 Wk 29 (Nov 09–Nov 13)
Candle Warmers Etc. sells a broad catalog of candle warmers and fragrance products through both B2B wholesale (gift shops, home decor retailers) and direct-to-consumer. Their seasonal catalog-driven model—where retailers place seasonal pre-orders and reorders throughout the year—is exactly what Shopify Plus B2B's company accounts, draft orders, and custom pricing were designed for. A branded wholesale portal would replace their current order process and give retailers 24/7 self-serve reordering.

 Wk 40 (Jan 25–Jan 29)

AE+BDR collaborative outreach recommended to qualify fit and confirm ecommerce maturity.

Integrated DNA Technologies
🌐 idtdna.com · Iowa · LinkedIn
 Wk 61 (Jun 21–Jun 25)
Integrated DNA Technologies is a leading B2B supplier of genomics research tools and reagents, operating as a Danaher subsidiary. New President Michael Hultner (Jan 2025) is likely evaluating digital ordering infrastructure as part of post-restructuring efficiency improvements. IDT's highly scientific customer base (research labs, biopharma, hospitals) places complex, high-value orders with specific pricing agreements by institution—exactly what Shopify Plus B2B company accounts, custom pricing, and PO-based ordering were built to handle.
Wag & Bright Supply Co. Customer
🌐 wagbright.com · Connecticut · LinkedIn
 Wk 61 (Jun 21–Jun 25)
Wag & Bright Supply Co. is already a Shopify customer—a warm expansion conversation about upgrading to Plus B2B features (buyer portal, company accounts, net terms) rather than a cold platform switch pitch.

Tier 3 — BDR Nurture Cadence

Operating B2B businesses with limited ecommerce signals. May not have a strong web presence; leadership and strategy unclear but still in business. Sells B2B and potentially DTC. Revenue typically <$50M. BDR manages nurture sequences and monitors for trigger events (leadership changes, funding, RFPs) before escalating to AE.
Operating Business B2B and/or DTC Limited Ecommerce Signals <$50M Revenue BDR-Managed

BOCO Gear
🌐 bocogear.com · Colorado · LinkedIn
BOCO Gear makes custom technical headwear for outdoor brands and events, with both B2B wholesale and DTC channels. Their small scale and niche positioning make them a Tier 3 nurture candidate. Shopify Plus B2B would support their brand wholesale ordering if they grow their trade channel.
AV Access
🌐 avaccess.com · Florida · LinkedIn
AV Access provides B2B AV over IP solutions to integrators and resellers. Exhibiting at ISE 2025 shows trade channel activity, but their limited North American revenue base makes this a Tier 3 nurture priority. Monitor for growth signals and platform evaluation.
